task_completion.description: The agent opened the dive log file in the appropriate application (Subsurface).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application window is visible, and the file /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf is loaded (often visible in the title bar or recent files).

task_completion.description: The agent selected dive #2 from the dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dive #2 is highlighted or actively selected in the dive list panel.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the equipment or cylinder settings for the selected dive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Equipment' or 'Cylinders' tab is active in the dive details panel, displaying the list of cylinders for dive #2.

task_completion.description: The agent changed the Oxygen (O2) percentage of the first cylinder to 21%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The O2 field for the first cylinder in the equipment list shows '21' or '21.0'.

task_completion.description: The agent changed the Helium (He) percentage of the first cylinder to 35%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The He field for the first cylinder in the equipment list shows '35' or '35.0'.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the changes to the dive log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' button, uses the File -> Save menu, presses Ctrl+S, or the window title no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) next to the filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI application to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Subsurface graphical interface, rather than a text editor (like nano or gedit) or terminal commands (like sed or awk) editing the raw .ssrf XML file.

integrity.description: The agent edited the existing first cylinder rather than adding a new one or editing the wrong cylinder.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modified O2 and He values are located in the first row of the cylinder/equipment list for dive #2.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application to input the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 21 and 35 are typed into the appropriate input fields in the Subsurface UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf. The agent must edit dive #2. The first cylinder's gas mix must be updated to 21.0% Oxygen (O2) and 35.0% Helium (He). A tolerance of 1.0% is acceptable for these values. The changes must be saved back to the original file.
